name: ci_autofix
description: GitHub webhook (workflow_run) on the main PawFlow listener: verifies the HMAC signature, and when a CI run fails on the configured branch, injects a message into a configurable conversation asking the agent to fix and push. The webhook route is per-instance (/webhooks/github/<slot>), so multiple deploys/users never collide.

parameters.script:
import hmac, hashlib, json
secret = (attributes.get('webhook.secret') or '')
sig = (attributes.get('http.header.x-hub-signature-256') or '')
raw = content.encode('utf-8')
expected = 'sha256=' + hmac.new(secret.encode('utf-8'), raw, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
valid = bool(secret) and bool(sig) and hmac.compare_digest(sig, expected)
target_branch = '${ci_branch}'
decision = 'ignore'
if not valid:
    decision = 'bad_sig'
else:
    try:
        body = json.loads(content)
    except Exception:
        body = {}
    wr = body.get('workflow_run') or {}
    action = body.get('action', '')
    branch = wr.get('head_branch', '')
    conclusion = wr.get('conclusion', '')
    repo = (body.get('repository') or {}).get('full_name', '')
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.action', action)
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.branch', branch)
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.conclusion', conclusion)
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.run_url', wr.get('html_url', ''))
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.sha', wr.get('head_sha', ''))
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.workflow', wr.get('name', ''))
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.run_id', str(wr.get('id', '')))
    flowfile.set_attribute('gh.repo', repo)
    if action == 'completed' and branch == target_branch and conclusion == 'failure':
        decision = 'fix'
flowfile.set_attribute('flow.decision', decision)

repo = attributes.get('gh.repo', '')
branch = attributes.get('gh.branch', '')
run_url = attributes.get('gh.run_url', '')
sha = attributes.get('gh.sha', '')
wf = attributes.get('gh.workflow', '')
result = (
    'Le CI GitHub a echoue sur ' + repo + ' (branche ' + branch + ').\n'
    'Workflow: ' + wf + '\n'
    'Run: ' + run_url + '\n'
    'Commit: ' + sha + '\n\n'
    'Analyse les logs du run echoue (gh run view --log-failed, ou via le web), identifie la cause racine, '
    'corrige le code, puis commit + push la correction sur ' + branch + '.\n'
    'Garde-fou: si apres 3 tentatives le CI echoue toujours, arrete, ne repush pas, et signale le blocage.'
)

import json
decision = attributes.get('flow.decision', 'ignore')
status = '401' if decision == 'bad_sig' else '200'
flowfile.set_attribute('http.response.status', status)
flowfile.set_attribute('http.response.header.Content-Type', 'application/json')
label = {'bad_sig': 'rejected', 'fix': 'accepted', 'ignore': 'ignored'}.get(decision, 'ignored')
result = json.dumps({'status': label, 'decision': decision})
